title: Elytra Bonk
description: Mod that plays a bonk sound when you fly into a wall with an elytra
body:
## Elytra Bonk
[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-bonk)
|
[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/elytra-bonk)
|
[GitHub](https://github.com/apehum/elytra-bonk)

Client-side Fabric & NeoForge mod that plays a bonk sound when you fly into a wall with an elytra

Inspired by [Celeste Bonk Mod](https://gamebanana.com/mods/373922)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/LGjLKrzUkw8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
